description: Sling parent POM enforcer rules silently broken with enforcer < 3.2.1
scala-maven-plugin < 4.9.5 calls add() on immutable lists returned by Maven 4 API
Maven plugins at 4.0.0-beta-1 use removed API (ProjectManager methods renamed/removed before RC)
maven-enforcer-plugin < 3.0.0 uses removed PluginParameterExpressionEvaluator constructor
Old Quarkus/plugin versions use ServiceLocator pattern removed in Maven 4
exec-maven-plugin < 3.2.0 calls MavenSession.getContainer() which returns null in Maven 4
Project depends on SNAPSHOT artifacts not available in release repositories
commons-release-plugin clean-staging fails under Maven 4 — commons-ognl is dormant
jax-maven-plugin 0.1.8 NPE under Maven 4 — plugin unmaintained, oozie is retired
maven-compiler-plugin < 3.11 cannot find ErrorProne plug-in under Maven 4 classloading

TransitiveDependencyManager applies dependencyManagement at all depths, which can downgrade transitive dependency versions and trigger enforcer violations — this is intended Maven 4 behavior, projects need to add explicit dependencyManagement
hadoop-project 3.1.0, 3.2.0-3.2.2 and 3.3.0 have invalid XML (<Xlint:-unchecked/>) causing Non-parseable POM errors in Maven 4, losing transitive deps
Maven 4 no longer interpolates properties in <module> paths at POM reading time — projects using ${spark.version} or similar in module names fail
Quarkus plugin (especially < 3.20) uses ServiceLocator/RepositorySystem patterns incompatible with Maven 4's Sisu-based DI
SNAPSHOT artifacts marked as 'present, but unavailable' under Maven 4's resolver — different metadata handling
Maven 4's prefix-based repository routing blocks artifacts not matching /.meta/prefixes.txt — artifacts available in Maven 3 become unfindable
Tycho < 5.0 uses Guice/Sisu injection patterns broken by Maven 4's classloading — upgrade to Tycho 5.0.3+
Maven 4 classloading changes cause 'foreign imports' errors in plugins that rely on Maven 3's classrealm layout (Quarkus, JAXB, etc.)

Maven 4's TransitiveDependencyManager changes transitive dependency resolution, causing previously available dependencies to disappear from the classpath — projects need to add explicit dependency declarations
Maven 4's TransitiveDependencyManager changes cause 'cannot find symbol' compilation errors — transitive dependencies no longer on classpath
Maven 4's TransitiveDependencyManager changes cause Scala compilation errors — transitive dependencies (javax.annotation, etc.) no longer on classpath
errorPatterns: is not a member of package

description: Maven 4's different dependency resolution brings in new transitive deps not listed in the project's license MISSING.properties file, causing license-maven-plugin to fail
Karaf feature verification fails under Maven 4 due to OSGi bundle version mismatches from changed transitive dependency resolution
Projects using ${revision} CI-friendly versions without flatten-maven-plugin have missing dependency versions under Maven 4's stricter validation
maven-site-plugin Velocity template rendering fails under Maven 4 — incompatible site plugin version
Maven 4 rejects dependency resolution when transitive dependencies have uninterpolated ${...} version expressions, causing 'Invalid Collect Request: null'
Maven 4's stricter POM validation rejects uninterpolated ${...} expressions in repository URLs, distribution management IDs, and other POM fields that Maven 3 silently accepted
maven-shade-plugin's dependency-reduced-pom.xml causes 'The parents form a cycle' error in Maven 4's stricter model builder
Maven 4's stricter XML parser rejects transitive POMs with invalid XML (illegal processing instructions, undeclared namespace prefixes) that Maven 3 tolerated
cyclonedx-maven-plugin fails with 'Invalid Version Range Request' when project uses ${revision} CI-friendly versions
Develocity Maven extension fails to initialize under Maven 4 due to SLF4J classloading changes — ClassNotFoundException: org.slf4j.impl.SimpleLogger
spotless-maven-plugin format check fails because mvnup POM modifications change formatting that spotless enforces
sortpom-maven-plugin verify fails because mvnup POM modifications change the order/content that sortpom enforces
Maven 4's stricter POM parser rejects duplicate XML elements (artifactId, properties, etc.) that Maven 3 silently accepted — project POMs need to be fixed
Maven 4's stricter POM validation rejects duplicate dependency declarations (same groupId:artifactId) that Maven 3 silently merged
Ancient org.scala-tools:maven-scala-plugin (unmaintained since 2011) calls add() on immutable lists returned by Maven 4 API — projects should migrate to net.alchim31.maven:scala-maven-plugin
pgpverify-maven-plugin < 1.20 hits ClassCastException with Maven 4's resolver re-entrancy marker in RequestTrace — resolver regression being tracked
Maven 4's model builder reorders POM elements into a canonical order that differs from source, breaking enforcer rules that check element ordering
